input.background: Let us return to the conditions specified in the previous exercise.
input.question: How large a sample would be needed to detect the proposed difference in gestational lengths with $90 \%$ power at $\alpha=0.05$ (two sided)?

output.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量

gestational_length_difference.description: Proposed difference in mean gestational lengths between the two groups that the study aims to detect

alpha.description: Significance level for the two-sided hypothesis test

power.description: Desired statistical power of the test

sample_size.description: Required sample size to detect the proposed difference in gestational lengths with given alpha and power

meta_info.caption: Gestational length, African American women, sample size.
